creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #12)
It should say, "consisting of the effective and real user IDs, and the list of groups (whose first member is the effective group ID)".  In particular, the kernel code prints "cr_uid cr_ruid cr_rgid,cr_groups[0],cr_groups[1],...".

So my comment is wrong as well, this code is looking for the real UID (cr_ruid), which I think would be the 12th field.
